description: Product Description MINI ELECTRIC SEWING MACHINE Flying Banana mini electric sewing machine is portable and simple to operate for household sewing. Even a sewing beginner can easily get started. Sewing Made Easy Multi sewing machine is great for small sewing projects and minor repairs. Sewing machine for beginners is small size and rugged, lightweight design make it perfect when traveling.they are small, safe, and extremely easy to use, making them a great way to introduce children to the worlds of sewing, tailoring, quilting and crafting. Upgraded Purple Mini Portable Electric Sewing Machine we have continuously developed our portable electric sewing machine to make sewing simple and easy to operate. Our electric sewing machines not only provide efficient sewing services for families, but also bring Endless fun. We always believe, sewing! is a happy and warm thing. Portable Design: Compact and lightweight in a mini size Simple Operation: Easy threading and stitching for beginners Multi-function: 12 preset stitch patterns, 2 power mode and 2 speed mode Superior Sewing Kit: Sewing accessories pack with 4 bobbins, 4 needles, 1 needle threader, 1 foot pedal, and 1 adapter, 1 extension table Simple to Operate for Sewing Beginners Turn the bobbin winder spool to confirm no knots before use Kids should operate with adults guidance Perfect for Simple Sewing or DIY at home Featured Two-line Design Adjustable Tightness 2 Power Supply Modes Built-in Thread Cutter & Light Superior Sewing Kit Includes 64 bobbin, 1 piercing tool, 100 needles in 1 pack, 1 threader, 1 scissors, 1 screwdriver, 1 glue, 1 tape measure and 1 extension table. LED Sewing Light Easy for you to thread and see all details when sewing. Sewing with light to protect your eyes and prevent fatigue. Large Extension Table Equipped with a large extension table to make sewing it more convenient and also keep stable of the sewing machine during sewing. Foot Pedal Operation Basic sewing machine for beginners with foot peda. Sewing beginners can control the speed with Foot Pedal. The Matters Need to Attention Before Using Follow the Threading Steps Loosen the Tension Pull the thread out about 4 inches
